name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Happy Easter! He is risen!
body:
| |
---

|
---
With everything that has happened since last year – Covid, lockdowns, the election, too many executive orders, and the continued onslaught against patriotic, Constitution-loving Americans – I admit that I am frightened.

Unfortunately, fear and anxiety are powerfully intoxicating. They can easily take over and become the driving force in our lives.

But, the good news is that they will never be as powerful as Jesus Christ and His resurrection!

We do not have to live in fear, no matter what happens in our short lifetimes on this earth, because our Lord is risen, having defeated death and despair.

That is my message to you this Easter. Do not despair. Yes, we fight on. Yes, we stand strong against the tyranny coming from the left and the White House. But, we do not despair because there is something much greater and bigger than this earthly life.

I pray you have a blessed Easter with your family and friends, and that you hold on to the hope that the resurrection brings throughout the year, not just today.

I want to leave you with an excerpt from C.S. Lewis’ _God in the Dock_. Lewis eloquently and beautifully describes this choice we have – to remain in despair in winter, or go into the beautiful spring and summer that the resurrection has made possible.
_Christ has risen, and so we shall rise. St. Peter for a few seconds walks on the water; and the day will come when there will be a re-made universe, infinitely obedient to the will of glorified and obedient men, when we can do all things, when we shall be those gods that we are described as being in Scripture. To be sure, it feels wintry enough still: but often in the very early spring it feels like that. Two thousand years are only a day or two by this scale. A man really ought to say, “The Resurrection happened two thousand years ago” in the same spirit in which he says, “I saw a crocus yesterday.” Because we know what is coming behind the crocus. The spring comes slowly down this way; but the great thing is that the corner has been turned. There is, of course, this difference that in the natural spring the crocus cannot choose whether it will respond or not. We can. We have the power either of withstanding the spring, and sinking back into the cosmic winter, or of going on into those “high mid-summer pomps” in which our leader, the Son of Man, already dwells, and to which he is calling us. It remains with us to follow or not, to die in this winter, or to go on into that spring and that summer._
**(“The Grand Miracle” _God in the Dock_)**
Happy Easter my dear friends.

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---

name: Team Faulconer
subject: Happy Easter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
We hope you’re having a great day today! Read more >>
Peter, We just wanted to take a moment to wish everyone a happy Easter! Whether you’re religious or not, we hope that you’re able to enjoy time today with your loved ones. A well-known proverb states, “No matter how long the winter, spring is sure to follow.” We can’t help but think about how that parallels what is happening in California right now. We’re getting ready to come out of the long dark winter of one-party rule in Sacramento and spring California back into life. There’s a lot of work ahead, but today, we hope you are able to relax and enjoy the holiday with your family and friends. Happy Easter from Team Faulconer! | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/4fd688e3428cdb30/0bdf9d175399fdebc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/4fd688e3428cdb30/93553733b947bc78c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/4fd688e3428cdb30/7fb2df1cadf3c937c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Border Team (Via House GOP)
subject: Trump is waiting to see your name on this list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can only accept the first 10,000 people.

Here's what we know as facts, Fellow Conservative:

_Biden inherited a secure border.

Trump created that extremely secure border.

Republicans know how to handle immigration and **keep our borders secure.**_

Recently, Trump mentioned he was considering visiting the border to see how bad the crisis really is. He's a president who knows how to run our great country and the only one who wants to fix this catastrophe. We all know we need to finish the wall, **and Trump is still fighting to make that happen. **

**If you want President Trump to go to the border to expose what 's really going on, don't wait to join our task force. [_We can only accept the first 10,000 people._](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017-8PhBENz2dfWlryT4qlRjT9K14Jjey6i9pIabrfIDDulV6Tp3Aqafz-Wno5KALOLAPOaJh7qXUzKMuf157-CrD4HDQLhKQHxeD_uZJeG2Vzd9jlbmznB2h4P0DNrQ8V9-yprR4y_VXqD4UTYDusJFXgTmxnKQE55BCirLTB3uXX7Ect6PmLxfZ-el4rzbbbAQ81Ql9tpyr--T-xnSlVC-YrOLeOFpYo4ysNRh8eW30OSJRtmGOTXNbeSp4gwrdevWbxq_GFMD5dl2gn5dvc-cMh5bu5jMAOohpQzgvAkmhoQ3porg44EBaBIW4VS0Atfi1Bd9RXHZ9btjMsRXg1PJmNR3axSZ5x4Of0JC7j6NCmuruETtA1Mfllq1wvVey31f3GLSh03t4Z2Qx78QbFolQpWVUGGzr4jIXowT08_GC88Ol0rSq4g9-uXcdvfjFxJ7II443clhxeVA8DxNvBqg==&c=F4CzFu8DtFgMXFzZauc0NTYlYL0gIspXTik3V9JpWJTImIzPoWFVKA==&ch=68whBMnNab1lSKQVLcryJn_MlWjsA_Zl8FwDGnYEw68uQyK8SRtDQA==)**

name: The GOP Easter Bunny
subject: We reserved your spot for 1 hr
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
your signature is still MISSING from Donald and Melania Trump's card!

_**Happy Easter, Fellow Conservative! **_

**This is your absolute LAST CHANCE to sign First Lady Melania and President Trump 's Easter card! **
[**Sign the card now!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GscwI8NkhESr1H7Y8k-72tV7lz8PynrBRXA84n0aa2pMXVCcujD4oOWekhb6n7hdVYLstgLXb0Qgj7Ag2Xo-VAD9RtUwd1flDr-fZYZ4maNS_g7iBRb-Y6NUVqkMVnNnJ0QIlUU7Lm1iFT7iHsZAxTR3tlHVArbqKkdKFpHfY448G1gClLqbWnF6QQV0vpNYXGEM9CcmbjRXf-p6z9Ex0g4d465WiCKG2Ul1GuntfdFtSU3wP-jgltvrpaFAVcDbyz6H7ICs4KObJtxxyqDLKIPo3ozATqM0MPfUB5GEMH6J2r9YJPHeEeDlPr8aEaeaLSoyRZ3RjKfmhMVvwIJzWXmz02e6jwSUA-nXsDO_fI9bg-EHpagaKn7W6aP8fmM3j_9GQ2JwwJISnVO8jCo9C-qWU2dDi5FNVA-wF2G61u7pdHo6ieSTaA==&c=MK095kBRLpI--qRBUR-mNnO2ZEFAwRyOzfSIeMSUeXprMgjQj-ObqQ==&ch=cPGeM9U_wQbyD03EdfELH3Eo719l6uZwNbEQBdW5FW4rZD-F9UEYAg==)

The Trumps work day and night to make America great, so please join us in signing this card to let them know just how much their hard work means to us.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GscwI8NkhESr1H7Y8k-72tV7lz8PynrBRXA84n0aa2pMXVCcujD4oOWekhb6n7hdVYLstgLXb0Qgj7Ag2Xo-VAD9RtUwd1flDr-fZYZ4maNS_g7iBRb-Y6NUVqkMVnNnJ0QIlUU7Lm1iFT7iHsZAxTR3tlHVArbqKkdKFpHfY448G1gClLqbWnF6QQV0vpNYXGEM9CcmbjRXf-p6z9Ex0g4d465WiCKG2Ul1GuntfdFtSU3wP-jgltvrpaFAVcDbyz6H7ICs4KObJtxxyqDLKIPo3ozATqM0MPfUB5GEMH6J2r9YJPHeEeDlPr8aEaeaLSoyRZ3RjKfmhMVvwIJzWXmz02e6jwSUA-nXsDO_fI9bg-EHpagaKn7W6aP8fmM3j_9GQ2JwwJISnVO8jCo9C-qWU2dDi5FNVA-wF2G61u7pdHo6ieSTaA==&c=MK095kBRLpI--qRBUR-mNnO2ZEFAwRyOzfSIeMSUeXprMgjQj-ObqQ==&ch=cPGeM9U_wQbyD03EdfELH3Eo719l6uZwNbEQBdW5FW4rZD-F9UEYAg==)
As a TRUE TRUMP PATRIOT, we want to make sure the Trumps see YOUR name FIRST when they open their card. _That 's why we are reserving a special spot right at the top for you to sign!_

There is limited space left, so we're reaching out to you, Fellow Conservative, before anyone else. [**If you sign in the next 1 hour, we 'll even guarantee a spot at the top of our Easter card!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GscwI8NkhESr1H7Y8k-72tV7lz8PynrBRXA84n0aa2pMXVCcujD4oOWekhb6n7hdVYLstgLXb0Qgj7Ag2Xo-VAD9RtUwd1flDr-fZYZ4maNS_g7iBRb-Y6NUVqkMVnNnJ0QIlUU7Lm1iFT7iHsZAxTR3tlHVArbqKkdKFpHfY448G1gClLqbWnF6QQV0vpNYXGEM9CcmbjRXf-p6z9Ex0g4d465WiCKG2Ul1GuntfdFtSU3wP-jgltvrpaFAVcDbyz6H7ICs4KObJtxxyqDLKIPo3ozATqM0MPfUB5GEMH6J2r9YJPHeEeDlPr8aEaeaLSoyRZ3RjKfmhMVvwIJzWXmz02e6jwSUA-nXsDO_fI9bg-EHpagaKn7W6aP8fmM3j_9GQ2JwwJISnVO8jCo9C-qWU2dDi5FNVA-wF2G61u7pdHo6ieSTaA==&c=MK095kBRLpI--qRBUR-mNnO2ZEFAwRyOzfSIeMSUeXprMgjQj-ObqQ==&ch=cPGeM9U_wQbyD03EdfELH3Eo719l6uZwNbEQBdW5FW4rZD-F9UEYAg==)

name: GOP Polls via NVAF
subject: Trump banned AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
Just this week, Facebook BANNED clips of an interview with former President Trump that was shared on Lara Trump's page. And let's not forget that Twitter enacted a ridiculous lifetime ban of President Trump.
Big Tech is at it again!

Just this week, Facebook BANNED clips of an interview with former President Trump that was shared on Lara Trump's page.

And let's not forget that Twitter enacted a ridiculous lifetime ban of President Trump. **President Trump isn 't the only one being silenced. Big Tech's censorship of Conservative voices is UNAMERICAN and should not be tolerated!** [**Do you think Big Tech should be able to censor Conservatives? Take the survey ->**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FvZv8C_uicpCqNJuKdvcwM7-LnQdYbFvcerrj3ewrJN6rQK9qZfGt39pQErf2Pcgdykxx8yUS7nUazKyZTiuZuEnj4oT8HmqdFJYtyzG8CkWfRmn8ptOa4ghtviVjUDEqi028jSLzZ7ec4IknRoVn0lisntD-ccBIcM9_w2SRdqIwS5wRMEhGzFj4Yu1kj4w3Ye9bjlDPunW7cojOD_AkmYZMFfx-WbhxOinQERf8a3VF9Z1WEPPBxY6r8pXTu-g24uzcqzz6inx9xIrYkM8YD2tqvGRX3EqMQxO-TATPdYt5MzxCha6uwW0lbnXlKSTn7dNkanewYV9QeU5VSXR5T_pqvO8dis1nKvxJhtQT91a-xMGIERzKz60henPoZ_Qd5ApNdC97DNcIieQtksOZw==&c=3GxllX-PbYnnVc9ss0IGkQMnjnChrkLgtquNgSqT-07xDUfdjA5Zsg==&ch=PBG2YR5eG3BW3qAnsoEsxcawD-_pj8qoUhgST5XXtKLNfTbW6L5VJw==)

Our Constitution guarantees EVERY American the right to Free Speech. Big tech is violating that right and even "CANCELING" anyone who counters their liberal worldview. Do YOU think this should be allowed? [**> > Take the Big Tech Survey <<**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FvZv8C_uicpCqNJuKdvcwM7-LnQdYbFvcerrj3ewrJN6rQK9qZfGt39pQErf2Pcgdykxx8yUS7nUazKyZTiuZuEnj4oT8HmqdFJYtyzG8CkWfRmn8ptOa4ghtviVjUDEqi028jSLzZ7ec4IknRoVn0lisntD-ccBIcM9_w2SRdqIwS5wRMEhGzFj4Yu1kj4w3Ye9bjlDPunW7cojOD_AkmYZMFfx-WbhxOinQERf8a3VF9Z1WEPPBxY6r8pXTu-g24uzcqzz6inx9xIrYkM8YD2tqvGRX3EqMQxO-TATPdYt5MzxCha6uwW0lbnXlKSTn7dNkanewYV9QeU5VSXR5T_pqvO8dis1nKvxJhtQT91a-xMGIERzKz60henPoZ_Qd5ApNdC97DNcIieQtksOZw==&c=3GxllX-PbYnnVc9ss0IGkQMnjnChrkLgtquNgSqT-07xDUfdjA5Zsg==&ch=PBG2YR5eG3BW3qAnsoEsxcawD-_pj8qoUhgST5XXtKLNfTbW6L5VJw==) If these companies act this way against a former President of the United States, every day citizens should be very concerned. We want to know if this is something grassroots supporters like YOU care about. [**Take the 1-Question Survey to let us know what you think now!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FvZv8C_uicpCqNJuKdvcwM7-LnQdYbFvcerrj3ewrJN6rQK9qZfGt39pQErf2Pcgdykxx8yUS7nUazKyZTiuZuEnj4oT8HmqdFJYtyzG8CkWfRmn8ptOa4ghtviVjUDEqi028jSLzZ7ec4IknRoVn0lisntD-ccBIcM9_w2SRdqIwS5wRMEhGzFj4Yu1kj4w3Ye9bjlDPunW7cojOD_AkmYZMFfx-WbhxOinQERf8a3VF9Z1WEPPBxY6r8pXTu-g24uzcqzz6inx9xIrYkM8YD2tqvGRX3EqMQxO-TATPdYt5MzxCha6uwW0lbnXlKSTn7dNkanewYV9QeU5VSXR5T_pqvO8dis1nKvxJhtQT91a-xMGIERzKz60henPoZ_Qd5ApNdC97DNcIieQtksOZw==&c=3GxllX-PbYnnVc9ss0IGkQMnjnChrkLgtquNgSqT-07xDUfdjA5Zsg==&ch=PBG2YR5eG3BW3qAnsoEsxcawD-_pj8qoUhgST5XXtKLNfTbW6L5VJw==)

name: Team Miller-Meeks
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
I am wishing all my fellow Christians a Happy Easter.

|
---
Friend,

From my family to yours, I am wishing all my fellow Christians a Happy Easter.

In the spirit of this occasion, I hope everyone is able to spend time with family and friends on this special day.
While times may be difficult, I know that our faith will get us through this.

I hope today is a wonderful day of peace, love, and happiness for you and your family.

God Bless,

Congresswoman Miller-Meeks
| Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
---
Our mailing address is:
Miller-Meeks For Congress
P.O. Box 33
Ottumwa, IA 52501

Don't want to receive our emails anymore? NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002

The NRSC is the sole national committee dedicated to taking back the Senate Majority. We believe that emails are a vital way for us to communicate with supporters like you through breaking news alerts on issues and events critical to the future of our country and Senate Republicans. This committee is 100% committed to defeating all Democrat Senate candidates this cycle, but we rely on the generosity of supporters like you. 99% of the NRSC's donations come from small donations from our grassroots supporters.

This message reflects our committee's views and opinions. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of our online grassroots community.
